name: com.llamabrainlabs.ai-test-harness
description: Three-layer MCP-driven dev test harness for Unity: in-game IngameDebugConsole commands with CMD/OK/ERR sentinels, editor-only MCP tools (ath-cmd, ath-state, ath-wait), and Claude SKILL.md workflows. Mirrors the dirigible2D pattern documented at https://metagrue.com/2026/05/25/ai-test-harness/.
